message:
test: migrate integration tests from tokio to runtime_compat

Replaces #[tokio::test] with #[test] + run_async_test() helper across
all integration test files, using the project's own CompatRuntime
(RuntimeBuilder::current_thread) instead of depending on tokio's test
macro. This ensures integration tests exercise the same runtime
abstraction layer that production code uses, catching any compat issues
earlier.

Affected test files:
- cass_integration.rs: CassClient + correlation + accounting tests
- egress_tap_integration.rs: egress tap + tailer supervisor tests
- ingress_tap_integration.rs: ingress tap + policy gated injector tests
- noise_control_tests.rs: mute storage + notification gate tests
- resize_watchdog_integration.rs: IPC status + resize watchdog tests
- runtime_compat_tests.rs: mutex, rwlock, semaphore, spawn, sleep tests
- proptest_runtime_compat.rs: removes unused arb_acquire_count helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
